debug_info.goal:
R : CommRingCat
G : Scheme
inst✝³ : G.Over (Spec R)
inst✝² : GrpObj (G.asOver (Spec R))
inst✝¹ : IsDomain ↑R
inst✝ : IsAffine G
⊢ @AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.IsDiagonalisable (Spec R) G inst✝³ inst✝² ↔
    Submodule.span ↑R {a | IsGroupLikeElem (↑R) a} = ⊤

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · rintro ⟨A, _, e, _, _⟩
    let φ : Γ(G, ⊤) ≃ₐ[R] MonoidAlgebra R (Multiplicative A) :=
      (Scheme.Γ.mapIso e.symm).toAlgEquiv.trans (diagSpecIso R A).hom.toAlgEquiv
    rw [← φ.toLinearEquiv.map_eq_top, Submodule.map_span, Submodule.span_eq_top_iff]
    intro x; rw [Submodule.mem_map]
    exact ⟨φ x, Submodule.span_subset_span R _ _ (MonoidAlgebra.mem_span_groupLike R _) _,
      φ.symm_apply_apply x⟩
  · intro h
    let M : Submonoid Γ(G, ⊤) :=
      { carrier := {x | IsGroupLikeElem R x}
        mul_mem' := fun ha hb ↦ IsGroupLikeElem.mul ha hb
        one_mem' := IsGroupLikeElem.one }
    have : IsUnit (M : Γ(G, ⊤)) := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ IsGroupLikeElem.isUnit hx
    let A := Additive (submonoidIsUnitGroup this)
    have : AddCommGroup A :=
      @Additive.addCommGroup _ (Group.toCommGroup (submonoidIsUnitGroup this))
    refine ⟨A, this, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    let φ : MonoidAlgebra R (Multiplicative A) →ₐ[R] Γ(G, ⊤) :=
      MonoidAlgebra.lift R (Multiplicative A) Γ(G, ⊤) M.subtype
    have hφ : Function.Bijective φ := by
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · rw [RingHom.injective_iff_ker_eq_bot, RingHom.ker_eq_bot_iff_eq_zero]
        intro x hx; induction x using MonoidAlgebra.induction_on
        exact (linearIndependent_groupLike R M.subtype).ne_zero _ hx
      · rw [← LinearMap.range_eq_top, AlgHom.toLinearMap_apply, MonoidAlgebra.range_lift]
        simpa using h
    let e : G ≅ Spec(MonoidAlgebra R (Multiplicative A)) :=
      G.isoSpec ≪≫ Scheme.Spec.mapIso (AlgEquiv.ofBijective φ hφ).toRingEquiv
    · exact e ≪≫ (diagSpecIso R A).symm
    · infer_instance
    · refine IsMonHom.comp e.hom (diagSpecIso R A).inv ?_ ?_
      · refine IsMonHom.of_map e.inv ?_
        apply Mon.instIsMonHomHom
        apply (diagFunctorIso (Spec R)).inv.app _ ≫ (hopfSpec _).map _
        exact { hom := φ, commute_coassoc := by ext; simp [IsGroupLikeElem.comul_eq] }
      · apply IsMonHom.of_map (diagSpecIso R A).hom
        dsimp; infer_instance
